props.name: invert
props.description: When true, inverts colors for use on dark backgrounds.

props.name: progress
props.description: Progress value (0-100). When set to 0 or greater, shows a progress spinner instead of infinite.

props.name: size
props.description: Sets the size of the spinner.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.
